summary: P1 Pricing 'Antes/Depois Pro' (PricingBeforeAfter) — frontend full validation. 10/10 acceptance criteria pass on desktop + mobile. Drag (pointer), keyboard (Home/End/Arrow±5%), aria-valuenow, mini-previews (5 free / 8 pro swatches + badges), CTA text+href, DOM order (cards < BA < comparison) all verified. No console errors. No bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: PricingBeforeAfter.jsx: the `setHandleFromClientX` is invoked on `onPointerDown` even when the user clicks on the handle itself — this is fine because the handle is a child with pointerCapture, but be aware that clicking outside the handle inside the slider jumps the divider. UX seems intentional (click-to-jump). OK.
Handle CTA reads 'R$ {PRO.monthly}/mês' (67) — sourced from /app/frontend/src/data/pricingPlans.js (single source of truth). Good DRY.

Mobile (390px): the slider has fixed `minHeight: 520` which causes a tall section on small screens but content remains readable. Acceptable; consider min-h responsive `min-h-[420px] md:min-h-[520px]` for tighter mobile fit.
FREE_LIMITATIONS and PRO_SWATCHES are hard-coded inside PricingBeforeAfter.jsx — not derived from pricingPlans.js. If the team wants a single source of truth, move these to data file. Low priority.

Pro preview shows BadgeCheck *icon* next to 'Paleta · Pro'. The request mentions 'badge Verificado' — the icon represents verification visually but the literal word 'Verificado' appears only in the palette title 'Âmbar Verificado'. If product wants the explicit text 'Verificado' on a chip, add it. Cosmetic.
Section has correct accessibility: role=slider, aria-valuemin/max/now, aria-label, tabIndex=0, focus ring. Excellent a11y.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PricingBeforeAfter totalmente verde. Posições verificadas: cardPro@593 → BA@1184 → comparison-table@2359 (1920x4000). Aria-valuenow muda corretamente em drag (50→10→90) e teclado (Home=0, ArrowRight x2=10, ArrowLeft=5, End=100). Mobile 390px: handle drag de 100→20 funciona. CTA leva para /register?plan=pro com texto exato 'Assinar Pro · R$ 67/mês'. Free preview = 5 swatches sóbrios sem 'Pro'; Pro preview = 8 swatches + chip 'Pro' + chip 'v3' + BadgeCheck icon.
rca of the issue: Nenhum bug. Feature implementada corretamente em todos os critérios solicitados.
